CustomField.label: Force Reprocess
CustomField.description: Momentary admin action: check and save to requeue this signature for immediate agent re-diagnosis, overriding the cooldown. NortSignatureTrigger resets it to false on save and dispatches the diagnosis chain, so it behaves like a button, not a persistent state. Each force counts as one real agent invocation (Agent_Invocation_Count__c increments).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check and save to re-run the agent diagnosis on this signature now. The box resets itself; this charges one agent invocation.
